Trainer.notes: Flat-bottom or semi-symmetrical section, generous dihedral, forgiving stall. Never sweep the wing meaningfully.

Sport.notes: Mid-wing, moderate dihedral, comfortable with loops and rolls.

Fighter.notes: Swept, low-aspect-ratio wing; smaller, more effective control surfaces; fast and less forgiving — flag this in build notes.

Experimental.notes: Unconventional layout. With the Elevons-only control configuration this becomes a flying wing: use the low end of the CG band and the high end of the sweep band for pitch stability without a horizontal tail.

Aerobatic.notes: Near-neutral CG for symmetric up/down performance, oversized control surfaces and tail for authority. Wing section should be symmetrical.

Warbird.notes: Scale-inspired proportions: moderate taper, slightly heavier wing loading than a pure sport model is normal and expected.
